description: Factiva is a Dow Jones news and business information service that provides access to licensed news content, company information, and analytics-oriented datasets. Its developer-facing materials are published under the Dow Jones Developer Platform rather than directly on factiva.com.
summary: factiva.com exposes public developer documentation for Factiva HTTP APIs via the Dow Jones Developer Platform, using either a Factiva user key or Dow Jones OAuth bearer token; no public GraphQL, MCP, or CLI surface was found.
